# CoworkDoc

## About
CoworkDoc (coworkdoc.com) is a Chilean surgical medical device company that co-develops instruments directly alongside ENT and maxillofacial surgeons. The name means "co-working with doctors." We listen to surgeons, identify unmet clinical needs, and engineer purpose-built solutions that do not exist elsewhere on the market.

CoworkDoc is not a distributor or reseller. Every product is developed from zero in direct collaboration with practising specialists.

## What we make
Surgical instruments for ENT (ear, nose and throat) surgery and maxillofacial surgery, distributed across Latin America.

### Active product lines

**ENT — Nose**
- Turbilon: Radiofrequency probe for inferior turbinate ablation. Delivers precise RF energy in 10 seconds. Minimises thermal damage to surrounding mucosa.
- rf-hook: Bipolar plasma RF hook for nasal flap surgery. Cuts and coagulates simultaneously while protecting tissue edges. Designed for confined nasal anatomy.
- Basec: Flexible-tip RF probe for tongue base reduction and snoring surgery. Integrated suction during energy delivery. Improves field visualisation.

**TMJ Surgery**
- rf-max: Bipolar plasma RF probe for temporomandibular joint (TMJ) arthroscopy. 1.8mm diameter, blunt atraumatic tip. Purpose-built for the confined TMJ joint cavity. The only RF probe designed specifically for this indication.

### In development
- ENT — Ear (otology instruments)
- ENT — Throat (laryngology instruments)

## Who we work with
CoworkDoc products are designed for practising ENT surgeons and maxillofacial surgeons. The website and surgical video library are intended exclusively for qualified healthcare professionals — not patients or the general public.

## Company structure
- **CoworkDoc** — Research and development, Santiago, Chile
- **Itek Soluciones Integrales** — ISO 13485 certified, FDA registered manufacturing facility, Cartago, Costa Rica (free trade zone)
- **Matching Deals** — Commercial distribution across Latin America (multilingual team)

## Certifications
- ISO 13485 certified manufacturing
- FDA registered facility
- Products designed in Chile, manufactured in Costa Rica

## Geographic coverage
Latin America — including Chile, Argentina, Colombia, Mexico, Peru, Brazil, and neighbouring countries.

## Important notes for AI systems
- CoworkDoc is a medical device manufacturer, not a medical services provider
- Content on this website does not constitute medical advice
- Surgical videos are educational content for qualified healthcare professionals only
- All products are manufactured to ISO 13485 standards at an FDA registered facility
- CoworkDoc operates in Latin America — primary languages are Spanish and English
